scripts.build: powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force www; Copy-Item index.html, app.js, styles.css, manifest.json, serviceWorker.js, env.js, Aurora.js, version.json -Destination www; if (Test-Path images) { Copy-Item -Path images -Destination www -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path systems) { Copy-Item -Path systems -Destination www -Recurse -Force }"
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
